summary: The room is in excellent overall decorative order, showcasing a high-end modern open-plan reception and kitchen. Cleanliness is generally to a professional standard, with high-grade Miele kitchen appliances presenting immaculately clean and well-maintained. However, minor wear is evident under close inspection, including light scuffs on traffic walls, a distinct scratch on the laminate flooring, water marks on the nesting coffee tables, and visible pile shading to the velvet upholstery of the dining chairs and sofa.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: White emulsioned plaster ceiling with recessed LED spotlights, flush white air vent grills, and ceiling-mounted smoke and heat alarms.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Plaster walls finished in modern light cream/off-white emulsion.
defects: scuff mark eye level to external wall corner (P119)
light localized grey rub marks surrounding light switches (P120)
faint drip marks and minor splash marks to wall above worktop near kettle (P136, P137, P140)

items.name: Flooring
items.description: Oak-effect engineered wood/laminate flooring boards laid in a running pattern.
defects: dark scratch mark approximately 10cm long in living room area near the armchair base (P122)

items.name: Double-glazed Window
items.description: Large double-glazed window with white uPVC frame, silver metallic handle with key cylinder, and integrated trickle vent.
defects: minor dust to exterior window sill (P097)
glazing not clean with light exterior water spotting (P098)

items.name: Balcony Glass Door
items.description: Large glass balcony door with white uPVC frame, silver metallic locking handle, and set of keys attached.

items.name: Utility Door & Frame
items.description: White painted timber flush door with metal latch mechanism and white painted frame.
defects: small paint chip to the leading edge of the door frame just next to the latch plate (P164)

items.name: Sofa
items.description: Two-seat modern sofa upholstered in grey velvet fabric, featuring a tufted seat pad, metallic peg legs, and loose bolsters.
defects: nap shading and surface rubbing to leading edge of right armrest (P103)
faint water ring shade mark to the center of the seat cushion (P105)

items.name: Armchair
items.description: Accent armchair upholstered in pale grey velvet with a modern brass-effect metal wire frame base.
defects: minor pale scuff marks to the upper backrest upholstery (P112)

items.name: Nesting Coffee Tables
items.description: Set of two circular nesting tables featuring white marble-effect laminate tops and black powder-coated circular metal frames.
defects: faint circular ring watermark visible on the larger table surface (P108)

items.name: TV Console Cabinet
items.description: Modern low-profile side cabinet featuring white marble-effect drawer fronts, slim gold metal bar handles, and gold-effect hairpin legs.
defects: minor pinprick scuff mark on the face of the leftmost drawer front (P114)

items.name: Framed Canvas Art
items.description: Large vertical rectangular canvas painting depicting abstract white and gold lotus flowers on a black background, inside a thin black frame.

items.name: Full-Length Floor Mirror
items.description: Tall rectangular mirror housed in a minimalist matte black metal frame.

items.name: Dining Table
items.description: Round dining table featuring a white marble-patterned laminate top on a black powder-coated metal pedestal column with round flat base.

items.name: Dining Chairs
items.description: Upholstered dining chairs in grey-blue velvet fabric with slim black splayed metal legs.
defects: dark localized shading and nap compression on the center of seat cushions (P095, P096)

items.name: Bar Stools
items.description: Slim breakfast bar counter stools with dark grey/black seats and black metal legs.

items.name: Geometric Rug
items.description: Medium pile rectangular floor rug in off-white and grey, featuring a modern geometric pattern with gold accents.

items.name: Pendant Lights
items.description: Set of three linear ceiling-hung light fixtures featuring black cords, gold cylindrical sockets, and oversized organic-shaped warm-tinted LED filament bulbs.

items.name: Kitchen Island
items.description: Large kitchen island with white engineered stone worktop, featuring side shelving in dark grey and integrated storage cabinetry on the reverse.

items.name: Kitchen Cabinetry
items.description: Modern flat-panel handleless cabinets finished in semi-gloss light taupe/greyish-beige, with integrated storage dividers.

items.name: Sink & Mixer Tap
items.description: Undermount single bowl stainless steel kitchen sink with a high-arch single lever pull-out mixer tap in dark gunmetal/bronze finish.
defects: fine superficial scratches to stainless steel bowl interior (P127)
very minor limescale residue at the base of the mixer tap column (P128)

items.name: Marble-Effect Backsplash
items.description: Solid polished stone wall cladding backsplash behind hob area featuring grey veining on a white background, with integrated under-cabinet LED strip lighting.

items.name: Miele Oven
items.description: Integrated Miele electric oven with dark glass door, brushed stainless steel trims, and interior wire racks.

items.name: Miele Microwave
items.description: Integrated Miele microwave oven with dark glass pull-down door and interior glass turntable.

items.name: Miele Induction Hob
items.description: Miele four-zone black glass induction cooktop.

items.name: Miele Dishwasher
items.description: Fully integrated Miele dishwasher, type G 5050 SCVi.

items.name: Miele Fridge-Freezer
items.description: Fully integrated Miele tall fridge-freezer with glass shelves and freezer drawer compartments.

items.name: Extractor Hood
items.description: Miele integrated canopy extractor hood with mesh metallic filters and light fittings.

items.name: Miele Washer-Dryer
items.description: Miele front-loading washer-dryer model WTD160 WCS, located in utility cupboard.
defects: minor grey scuff mark to side panel casing (P167)

items.name: Mechanical Ventilation Unit
items.description: Wall-mounted Nuaire MRXBOX mechanical ventilation and heat recovery unit in white.

items.name: Heat Interface Unit
items.description: Wall-mounted Danfoss heating unit in white casing.

items.name: Fire Strategy Notice
items.description: A4 fire strategy safety notice inside a silver aluminium clip frame, wall-mounted in entry corridor.

items.name: Hand Steamer
items.description: Handheld fabric clothes steamer in white and grey, with white cord, stored in utility cupboard.

items.name: Snoopy Table Lamp
items.description: Decorative table lamp with Snoopy figurine under a brass pole fitting and olive green base (shade missing), stored in utility cupboard.

items.name: Cutlery Set & Drawer Organizer
items.description: Wooden drawer cutlery organizer containing a set of stainless steel cutlery with cream handles, wooden spatula, peeler, kitchen scissors, and chef knife.

items.name: Pots & Pans
items.description: Stainless steel saucepan with lid, steel bowls, woks, frying pan with lid, and plastic food storage containers stored in under-sink cupboards.
